name: How is fault determined in occupational illness workers comp in Utah?
description: No fault required; prove work arose the illness.[1]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in occupational illness workers comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No fault required; prove work arose the illness.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No fault needed—strict liability if AOE/COE proven; employer negligence irrelevant.[1] Causation only.[1] Key factors: Medical link to job; presumption on-premises; rebuttable.[1] Focus evidence on exposure, not blame. Simplifies claims vs. tort.
